privileged_info_summary: The task requires configuring email alerts in Wazuh with synthetically generated target parameters. The expected configuration values strictly match the explicit instructions: SMTP server 'smtp.company.internal', email destination 'security-alerts@company.com', sender email 'wazuh@company.com', and a maximum of 12 emails per hour.
